generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom, I just don't understand why some people are so against giving our security agencies the tools they need to keep us safe. My sister works in counterterrorism, and she says these new measures have already stopped multiple threats we never even heard about. Yes, there are always concerns about privacy, but we can't let perfect be the enemy of good. Our families deserve protection, and these agencies need our trust to do their jobs effectively. #SecurityMatters #TrustOurExperts
